programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A billionaire banker is murdered and the 2-7 must investigate his many clients and employees; Price and Maroun struggle to keep the jury's focus on the crime and not the victim's darker side.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a woman in active labor is abducted, Rollins and Curry look to her doula for an account of events; Carisi tries to get a confession in front of the jury.

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: Serial killer Byron May is back on the streets and secretly living inside someone else's home; with his new skills resembling the currently incarcerated Eastside Ripper, suspicions abound as to whether the wrong man might be in prison.

programme.title: Happy's Place
programme.desc: After Bobbie and Isabella request that Steve find how the tavern can save money, he discovers a way by replacing himself with an AI accountant; Gabby gives Emmett a crash course on proper texting etiquette.

programme.title: Happy's Place
programme.desc: Bobbie tries to help Emmett and Isabella reconnect by forcing them into a darts tournament; Steve celebrates killing a spider until Takoda informs him about Iktomi, the Lakota trickster spirit.

programme.title: 1st Look
programme.desc: Tabitha Lipkin uncovers a hidden world of alpine wine, giant puppets and handcrafted food and art in Vermont.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: 1st Look
programme.desc: Lifestyle trends in food, night life, art, travel and entertainment.

programme.title: Open House NYC
programme.desc: Host Sara Gore presents a guide to upscale real estate in and around the Big Apple. In addition to a look at the hottest homes on the market, the show also provides interior design tips from specialists and a wealth of information on renovation and stylish living.

programme.title: Saturday Today in New York
programme.desc: The local news, weather and investigative stories impacting your community.

programme.title: Today
programme.desc: News headlines, interviews, and stories intended to inform, entertain, inspire and set the agenda each morning for Americans and help viewers with their finances, health and well-being.

programme.title: Saturday Today in New York
programme.desc: The local news, weather and investigative stories impacting your community.

programme.title: Saturday Today in New York
programme.desc: The local news, weather and investigative stories impacting your community.

programme.title: George to the Rescue
programme.desc: George Oliphant comes to the rescue of families in need of renovating their homes.

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom Protecting the Wild
programme.desc: In the Puget Sound, Peter and Dr. Rae witness the urgent struggle of resident orcas facing a critical threat to survival; the journey continues to a remote lagoon in Mexico's coastal desert, where gray whales have staged an extraordinary comeback.

programme.title: Earth Odyssey With Dylan Dreyer
programme.desc: Dylan Dreyer meets remarkable reptiles and amphibians, like enormous green sea turtles, tiny dancing frogs and a bright blue lizard.

programme.title: Wild Child
programme.desc: Sheinelle Jones meets the new babies of spring, including adorable foals, bear cubs and coyote pups.

programme.title: Forever Young With Dr. Pablo Prichard
programme.desc: Dr. Pablo, Danielle and Dr. Tania Elliott break down what's really happening inside the body, connecting the dots between teenage hormonal surges and adult stress while also revealing what can be done today to control hormone disruptions.

programme.title: 9/11 Survivors Speak Up
programme.desc: Hear from survivors, first responders and advocates about the devastating impact of 9/11 toxins and the lifetime benefits available; learning about your rights and protection under the law.

programme.title: Live: Premier League Soccer
programme.desc: Tottenham (7-9-16) hosts Brighton (12-10-10) at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. It is a crucial match as the season ends. Tottenham is in 18th, two points above the relegation zone, while Brighton is sitting in 9th and pushing for a top-half finish.

programme.title: Live: Premier League Goal Zone
programme.desc: The best moments from the weekend in Premier League action.
